query:
DELETE cm1
FROM campaign_metrics cm1
INNER JOIN campaign_metrics cm2
  ON cm1.campaignId = cm2.campaignId
  AND cm1.date = cm2.date
  AND cm1.id < cm2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 47k5kQkoq9oHa8j.root --database YKCqwPqSgxUTxNQRFe3oLu --execute 
DELETE cm1
FROM campaign_metrics cm1
INNER JOIN campaign_metrics cm2
  ON cm1.campaignId = cm2.campaignId
  AND cm1.date = cm2.date
  AND cm1.id < cm2.id;
